---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
description: "Christopher D. Johnston — Professor of Political Science and Sociology at Duke University. Research on mass belief systems, political identity, and decision-making."
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link rel="canonical" href="https://cdjohnston.com/" />
          <script type="application/ld+json">
          {
            "@context": "https://schema.org",
            "@type": "Person",
            "name": "Christopher D. Johnston",
            "url": "https://cdjohnston.com",
            "jobTitle": "Professor of Political Science and Sociology",
            "worksFor": {
              "@type": "Organization",
              "name": "Duke University"
            },
            "sameAs": [
              "https://github.com/cdj19",
              "https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=NJtWbbIAAAAJ&hl=en",
              "https://osf.io/fruc2/"
            ],
            "email": "christopher.johnston@duke.edu"
          }
          </script>
---

::: {.hero}
## Christopher D. Johnston {.hero-name}

**Professor of Political Science and Sociology at Duke University**

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="65%"}
My research and teaching explores the structure and origins of mass belief systems, social and political identities, and models of judgment and decision making.

I co-direct [Worldview Lab](https://kenan.ethics.duke.edu/worldview-lab/) at Duke's Kenan Institute for Ethics.

I am currently associate editor at the journal [*Political Psychology*](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/journal/14679221).

<div class="hero-buttons">
  <a class="btn btn-icon-outline"
     href="mailto:christopher.johnston@duke.edu"
     aria-label="Email">
    <i class="bi bi-envelope"></i>
  </a>

  <a class="btn btn-icon-outline"
     href="https://github.com/cdj19"
     target="_blank"
     rel="noopener noreferrer"
     aria-label="GitHub">
    <i class="bi bi-github"></i>
  </a>
  
  <a class="btn btn-icon-outline"
     href="https://gitlab.oit.duke.edu/cdj19"
     target="_blank"
     rel="noopener noreferrer"
     aria-label="GitLab">
    <i class="bi bi-gitlab"></i>
  </a>

<a class="btn btn-icon-outline"
   href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=NJtWbbIAAAAJ&hl=en"
   target="_blank"
   rel="noopener noreferrer"
   aria-label="Google Scholar"
   title="Google Scholar">
  <i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i>
</a>

<a class="btn btn-icon-outline osf"
   href="https://osf.io/fruc2/"
   target="_blank"
   rel="noopener noreferrer"
   aria-label="Open Science Framework"
   title="Open Science Framework">
  OSF
</a>

</div>
:::

::: {.column width="35%"}
![](images/headshot.jpg){.hero-headshot width=220px style="border-radius:50%; display:block; margin-left:auto; margin-right:auto;"}
:::
:::
:::
